title: Market Brief — Thursday, May 28, 2026
summary: GPU supply is bifurcated: H100 util-avail sits at just 11%, signaling severe shortage, while H200 shows 38% availability as workloads haven't migrated yet and B200 holds at 18%. A100 reads 23%, barely above the scarcity line. The day's biggest move: B200 spot surged 69.4% to $7.06/hr and H100 jumped 50.6% to $3.67/hr, confirming demand is slamming into constrained frontier compute.
paragraphs: GPU supply is bifurcated: H100 util-avail sits at just 11%, signaling severe shortage, while H200 shows 38% availability as workloads haven't migrated yet and B200 holds at 18%. A100 reads 23%, barely above the scarcity line. The day's biggest move: B200 spot surged 69.4% to $7.06/hr and H100 jumped 50.6% to $3.67/hr, confirming demand is slamming into constrained frontier compute.

At TCO-adjusted cost (1.25x spot), running Llama 70B on H100 costs roughly $13.40/M tokens, meaning DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.45/M output is selling at a loss of approximately $12.95/M tokens — pure cash burn to buy market share. OpenAI's gpt-oss-120b at $0.18/M output is equally underwater. Grades: OpenAI Neutral (premium tiers subsidize loss leaders), Anthropic Strong (Opus at $25/M holds margin), Google Neutral, DeepSeek Burning Cash.

H200 at 38% util-avail with 194% annualized price volatility is overvalued on a risk-adjusted basis — demand hasn't materialized to justify the hardware cycle hype. B200 at $5.31 OCPI versus $7.06 spot median, combined with 15% free offerings, is the undervalued capacity play — lock in reserve contracts now before utilization catches H100-level tightness.
bullets: 11% util-avail on H100 marks severe compute shortage, the tightest across all GPU classes.
38% util-avail on H200 suggests meaningful spare capacity despite being the newest widely deployed chip.
$7.06 median B200 spot price reflects a 69.4% single-day surge, the largest move in today's data.
21.78 LLMflation index means frontier inference costs have fallen roughly 78% since GPT-4 launch.
$0.18/M output on OpenAI gpt-oss-120b sits approximately $12/M below TCO-adjusted production cost.
80.5% annualized volatility on H100 OCPI pricing signals unstable supply dynamics unsuitable for unhedged exposure.
